/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/ar qc libblinkhash.a CMakeFiles/blinkhash.dir/Epoche.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blinkhash.dir/hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blinkhash.dir/inode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blinkhash.dir/lnode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blinkhash.dir/lnode_btree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blinkhash.dir/lnode_hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/blinkhash.dir/tree.cpp.o
/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/ranlib libblinkhash.a
